untranslatable_reason: Zigzag indicator (peak/trough filter) is not available in the allowed indicator list. The signal requires a custom zigzag oscillator implementation to identify peaks and troughs at a specified percentage threshold. This requires custom indicator calculation beyond the provided library. Approximated entry/exit using returns-based reversal logic as a proxy, but true zigzag pattern confirmation cannot be expressed.
translation_notes: ARONSON_DRY_0_0 describes an objective zigzag filter to reduce subjectivity in peak/trough identification. The allowed indicators do not include a zigzag or custom peak-trough detector. Attempted translation uses log_returns-based reversals (5% threshold) as a mechanical approximation, but this does NOT capture the actual zigzag percentage-filter logic described in the source material. Recommend implementing a custom zigzag indicator that identifies significant peaks/troughs at the 5% threshold level within a 50-bar lookback window for accurate backtesting.
